glosses.zh-Hans: 女售货员; 女营业员
glosses.vi: người bán hàng (nữ); nhân viên bán hàng (nữ)
glosses.ja: 販売員（女性）; 店員（女性）

sentences.target: Ich frage die Verkäuferin nach der Größe.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈfʁaːɡə diː fɛɐ̯ˈkɔɪ̯fəʁɪn naːx deːɐ ˈɡʁøːsə/

translations.de: Ich frage die Verkäuferin nach der Größe.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈfʁaːɡə diː fɛɐ̯ˈkɔɪ̯fəʁɪn naːx deːɐ ˈɡʁøːsə/
translations.en: I ask the saleswoman about the size.
translations.es: Le pregunto a la vendedora por la talla.
translations.fr: Je demande la taille à la vendeuse.
translations.ru: Я спрашиваю у продавщицы о размере.
translations.pt: Eu pergunto à vendedora o tamanho.
translations.he: אני שואל את המוכרת על המידה.
translations.vi: Tôi hỏi cô bán hàng về kích cỡ.
translations.nl: Ik vraag de verkoopster naar de maat.
translations.uk: Я запитую у продавчині про розмір.
translations.hi: मैं महिला दुकानदार से साइज़ पूछता हूँ.
translations.el: Ρωτάω την πωλήτρια για το μέγεθος.
translations.id: Saya bertanya kepada pramuniaga tentang ukuran.
translations.ja: 店員さんにサイズを聞きます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb; present tense, 1st person singular; selects an accusative object (die Verkäuferin) and a prepositional complement with nach + dative.
Definite article; feminine singular accusative; determiner for Verkäuferin (direct object).
Common noun; feminine; accusative direct object of frage.
Preposition; governs dative; introduces the topic being asked about.
Definite article; feminine singular dative; determiner for Größe (object of nach).
Common noun; dative singular as complement of the preposition nach.

sentences.target: Die Verkäuferin empfiehlt mir diese Schuhe.

translations.de: Die Verkäuferin empfiehlt mir diese Schuhe.
translations.en: The saleswoman recommends these shoes to me.
translations.es: La vendedora me recomienda estos zapatos.
translations.fr: La vendeuse me recommande ces chaussures.
translations.it: La commessa mi consiglia queste scarpe.
translations.zh-Hans: 售货员向我推荐这些鞋子。
translations.yue: 售貨員向我推薦呢啲鞋。
translations.pt: A vendedora me recomenda estes sapatos.
translations.he: המוכרת ממליצה לי על הנעליים האלה.
translations.vi: Cô bán hàng gợi ý cho tôi đôi giày này.
translations.nl: De verkoopster raadt me deze schoenen aan.
translations.hu: Az eladónő ezeket a cipőket ajánlja nekem.
translations.hi: महिला दुकानदार मुझे ये जूते सुझाती है.
translations.el: Η πωλήτρια μου προτείνει αυτά τα παπούτσια.
translations.nb: Ekspeditøren anbefaler disse skoene til meg.
translations.id: Pramuniaga menyarankan sepatu ini kepada saya.
translations.sv: Expediten rekommenderar de här skorna till mig.
translations.ja: 店員さんがこの靴を勧めてくれます。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; feminine singular nominative; determiner for the subject NP.
Common noun; feminine; nominative subject of empfiehlt.
Finite main verb; present tense, 3rd person singular; ditransitive, taking a dative recipient (mir) and an accusative theme (diese Schuhe).
Personal pronoun; 1st person singular dative; indirect object/recipient of empfiehlt.
Demonstrative determiner; plural accusative; modifies Schuhe (direct object).
Common noun; plural accusative; direct object/theme of empfiehlt.

sentences.target: Du kennst die Verkäuferin vom Bäcker.

translations.de: Du kennst die Verkäuferin vom Bäcker.
translations.en: You know the saleswoman from the bakery.
translations.es: Conoces a la vendedora de la panadería.
translations.fr: Tu connais la vendeuse de la boulangerie.
translations.zh-Hans: 你认识那家面包店的售货员。
translations.yue: 你識嗰間麵包店嘅售貨員。
translations.pt: Você conhece a vendedora da padaria.
translations.vi: Bạn biết cô bán hàng ở tiệm bánh.
translations.nl: Je kent de verkoopster van de bakker.
translations.hi: तुम बेकरी की महिला दुकानदार को जानते हो.
translations.el: Ξέρεις την πωλήτρια από το φούρνο.
translations.id: Kamu kenal pramuniaga di toko roti.
translations.ro: O cunoști pe vânzătoarea de la brutărie.
translations.ja: あなたはパン屋の店員さんを知っている。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 2nd person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb; present tense, 2nd person singular; transitive, selecting an accusative object (die Verkäuferin) and allowing an additional PP for source/association.
Definite article; feminine singular accusative; determiner for Verkäuferin (direct object).
Common noun; feminine; accusative direct object of kennst.
Preposition in contracted form (von + dem); governs dative; introduces a PP indicating origin/association.
Common noun; dative singular as complement of the preposition von (via contraction vom).

sentences.target: Ich bezahle bei der Verkäuferin mit Karte.
sentences.reading: /ɪç bəˈtsaːlə baɪ̯ deːɐ fɛɐ̯ˈkɔɪ̯fəʁɪn mɪt ˈkaʁtə/

translations.de: Ich bezahle bei der Verkäuferin mit Karte.
translations.ipa: /ɪç bəˈtsaːlə baɪ̯ deːɐ fɛɐ̯ˈkɔɪ̯fəʁɪn mɪt ˈkaʁtə/
translations.en: I pay the saleswoman by card.
translations.es: Pago a la vendedora con tarjeta.
translations.fr: Je paie la vendeuse par carte.
translations.it: Pago alla commessa con la carta.
translations.zh-Hans: 我用卡向女收银员付款。
translations.yue: 我用卡向女收銀員付款。
translations.pt: Eu pago à vendedora com cartão.
translations.vi: Tôi trả tiền cho cô bán hàng bằng thẻ.
translations.nl: Ik betaal de verkoopster met pin.
translations.hi: मैं महिला दुकानदार को कार्ड से भुगतान करता हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg betaler til ekspeditøren med kort.
translations.id: Saya membayar kepada pramuniaga dengan kartu.
translations.ja: 店員さんにカードで支払います。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb; present tense, 1st person singular; takes oblique complements with prepositions (bei + dative for location/person, mit + dative for instrument).
Preposition; governs dative; introduces location/association (the person at/with whom one pays).
Definite article; feminine singular dative; determiner for Verkäuferin (object of bei).
Common noun; feminine; dative complement of the preposition bei.
Preposition; governs dative; introduces instrument/means.
Common noun; dative singular as complement of mit; bare noun expressing instrument (no article).
